compensationType.description: The compensation type of the benchmark.

percentile.description:
The percentile of the benchmark.

For example: "P25" represents the 25th percentile.

benchmark.description:
The ordinal value of the benchmark.

"SALARY" and "TOTAL_CASH" are annual values in US dollars (USD).

"EQUITY_AS_FULLY_DILUTED_PERCENT" is represented as a annual grant value between 0 and 100: 1 represents 1%.

For CEO Founder benchmarks, this value represents total ownership instead of an annual grant value.
